name: Idris Flower Wallpaper Pharaoh Gold - Opalhouse™ designed with Jungalow™: Removable Vinyl, Self-Adhesive, Botanical Pattern
description: Bring any wall come alive with this Idris Flower Wallpaper from Opalhouse™ designed with Jungalow™. This decorative wallpaper features white floral prints on a yellowish golden background to instantly elevate the look and feel of your room. Featuring a peelable design with an adhesive at the back, this vinyl wallpaper allows for easy application. Simply cut the required length and peel off the backing and stick on the desired wall without any mess.
